zh-CN.name: 字母D
zh-CN.intro: 字母D是第四个字母，它有一个圆圆的肚子，直直的背，看起来像一扇门。D 能帮我们说好多词，比如 dog 和 daddy。

story.title: 字母D的故事
story.body: 字母D是第四个字母，它有一个圆圆的肚子，直直的背，看起来就像一扇门。有一天，字母D出门去玩，它先遇到了小鼓，小鼓咚咚咚地敲，D就跟着节奏跳起了舞。接着，一只小狗跑过来，摇着尾巴汪汪叫，D和小狗一起赛跑，玩得满头大汗。傍晚，爸爸下班回家了，D张开双臂给了爸爸一个大大的拥抱。晚上，D躺在妈妈怀里，听着妈妈说故事，故事里有很多D开头的词：doll, duck, dinner。D觉得好幸福，因为它能帮大家表达爱和快乐。

knowledge.title: 为什么字母D有肚皮？
knowledge.body: 古时候人们用符号表示门和帐篷，D就是从这个符号变来的。弯弯的部分像门框，直直的部分像门的边。大写D需要一笔写成：先写一竖，再画一个大肚子。记住，D是字母表里第四个字母哦。

en.name: Letter D
en.intro: Letter D is the fourth letter of the alphabet. It has a round belly and a straight back, looking like a door. D helps us say many words, like dog and daddy.

story.title: The Story of Letter D
story.body: Letter D is the fourth letter of the alphabet. It has a round belly and a straight back, looking just like a door. One day, D went out to play. First it met a drum. The drum beat 'dum, dum, dum,' so D danced along. Then a little dog ran up, wagging its tail and barking. D and the dog raced each other, playing until they were tired. In the evening, daddy came home from work, and D gave him a big hug. At night, D lay in mommy's arms, listening to her tell a story full of words that start with D: doll, duck, dinner. D felt so happy because it helps everyone express love and joy.

knowledge.title: Why does letter D have a belly?
knowledge.body: Long ago, people used a symbol to mean a door or tent. D comes from that symbol. The curved part is like a door frame, and the straight part is like the side. To write capital D, make a straight line down, then a big belly. Remember, D is the fourth letter of the alphabet.
